scope: Priority screen of the next 500 pending no-anchor players after batch 021, covering source rows 2997-3496, plus requested verification/projection of Na'jai Hines at source row 1816.
method: Start from pending players after source row 2996 with current-team values and no completed projection.
Screen the first 500 remaining pending rows, source rows 2997 through 3496.
Also verify Na'jai Hines because the user specifically requested that he be projected.
Skip players who do not clear 60 BBPR under the shared calibration after a scored historical anchor is assigned.
For every selected no-anchor row, assign a researched historicalRating from official roster, production, recruiting, and current sentiment context.
Use official team pages first, then reputable stat or team/local coverage when historical production or current role sentiment is needed.
Calculate opportunity, talent, projection score, and projected BBPR with the same calibration formulas used by the admin apply path.

formulas.syntheticHistoricalAnchor: No-imported-anchor players receive a researched historicalRating estimate from production, level, recruiting pedigree, physical tools, health, and role sentiment.
formulas.projectedBbprWithHistory: shared calibrateProjectedBbpr(anchoredPlayer, suggested) logic used by admin apply path

screeningSummary.excludedReason: Remaining screened rows either lacked enough sourced role/production signal, were crowded low-minute freshmen/internationals, had health/redshirt concerns, duplicate noise already handled separately, or calibrated at 60 BBPR or below.

players.researchSummary: Na'jai Hines receives a 74 returning-player anchor from Seton Hall freshman production, shot-blocking rate, and UConn transfer context. The shared returning-player blend lets current role and talent context move the projection without ignoring the scored anchor.

teamContext.starterEvidence: UConn context points to immediate frontcourt value with rim protection and efficient paint finishing
teamContext.scoredAnchor: Synthetic historical anchor: 74. This is used only because the projection export had no historical BBPR for the row.
teamContext.roleCap: Selected because the same shared calibration projects above 60 BBPR; screened rows at 60 or below were intentionally left out.
teamContext.positionCompetition: UConn's frontcourt has enough competition to keep this as a strong maybe-start case

evidence.notes: Official roster context verifies Na'jai Hines in the current UConn player pool used for this projection pass.
